::: {.sabr-hero}
# Welcome to the SABRhood

Welcome to the 'hood! Join us to learn more about the trends and #'s below the surface that control where the game is heading.

[Read Articles](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-metallic}
[Explore Leaderboards](leaderboards.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Stat Glossary](glossary.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-light}
:::

::: {.sabr-grid}

::: {.sabr-card}
<span class="sabr-pill">Articles</span>

## Get schooled on the numbers behind the game.

Player/team trends, prospects, and season expectations.

[Read Articles](blog.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: {.sabr-card}
<span class="sabr-pill">Leaderboards</span>

## Sort though our niche league leaders.

Custom leaderboards that make you say, "Huh".

[View Leaderboards](leaderboards.qmd){.btn .btn-sabr-navy}
:::

::: {.sabr-card}
<span class="sabr-pill">Glossary</span>

## Even Manny Machado can understand our stats.

Explanations for custom and universal baseball stats.

[Open Glossary](glossary.qmd){.btn .btn-metallic}
:::

:::
